title: PTC's Q3 Earnings & Revenues Miss Estimates, Stock Down
text: PTC's third-quarter fiscal 2022 performance gains from momentum across its product portfolio. Unfavorable forex movement and the impact of exiting Russia due to the Ukraine war were dampeners.

title: PTC, Inc. (PTC) CEO Jim Heppelmann on Q3 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: PTC, Inc. (NASDAQ:PTC ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 27, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Matt Shimao - Head, Investor Relations Jim Heppelmann - Chief Executive Officer Kristian Talvitie - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Matthew Broome - Mizuho Securities Saket Kalia - Barclays Andrew Obin - Bank of America Blair Abernethy - Rosenblatt Securities Adam Borg - Stifel Jay Vleeschhouwer - Griffin Securities Joe Vruwink - Baird Matt Swanson - RBC Capital Markets Yun Kim - Loop Capital Markets Tyler Radke - Citi Ken Wong - Oppenheimer Operator Good afternoon, ladies and gentlemen. Thank you for standing by and welcome to the PTC 2022 Third Quarter Conference Call.

title: PTC Inc. (PTC) Misses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: PTC Inc. (PTC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of -9.35% and 2.80%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: PTC Announces Third fiscal Quarter 2022 Results
text: Strong Q3 performance; Raising FY'22 constant currency ARR and Cash Flow guidance BOSTON , July 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) today reported financial results for its third fiscal quarter ended June 30, 2022.  "In our third fiscal quarter, we again delivered strong results.

title: Here's What You Should Know Ahead of PTC's Q3 Earnings Release
text: Robust demand for products, especially digital transformation and SaaS, across all segments is expected to have driven PTC's performance in the fiscal third quarter.

title: 2 Growth Stocks to Buy in a Bear Market

title: Reasons to Retain CDW Stock in Your Portfolio at the Moment
